summary: Comprehensive testing of Drops Curated - premium streetwear discovery platform. All backend APIs (17 tests) and frontend UI flows passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductPage.js line 18: React Hook useEffect has missing dependency 'fetchProduct' - minor ESLint warning, not blocking
test_credentials: No auth required for browsing. Subscribe form tested with phone: 9876543211
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 998 scraped products from 3 brands
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend has 17 passing API tests covering search, products, subscribe, scrape status, trending, brands endpoints. Frontend has all pages working: Landing (hero, features, CTA, footer), Browse (product grid, search, filters), Product Detail (image, price comparison table, buy links), Subscribe (plans, form validation, success state). Design uses warm minimalist theme with Navy #001F3F, Gold #D4AF37, Warm White #FDFBF7.

landing_page.footer: PASS - brand name, nav links, brand names visible
landing_page.navigation: PASS - Drops, Subscribe, Get Alerts links work

browse_page.product_cards: PASS - images, prices, brand names visible
browse_page.navigation_to_product: PASS - clicking card navigates to product page

product_page.price_comparison_table: PASS - shows multiple sources with buy buttons

subscribe_page.plans_grid: PASS - Free, Pro, Premium plans visible
subscribe_page.form_validation: PASS - invalid phone shows error toast
subscribe_page.form_submission: PASS - valid submission shows success state
subscribe_page.success_state: PASS - 'You're In' message with Explore Drops button
